overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a gold convertible driving through Night City. The vehicle travels from an open industrial highway through curved ramps, tunnels, and sunken trenches into the dense downtown core with towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards. The scene features warm golden-hour lighting with long shadows and a mix of industrial infrastructure and futuristic corporate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane elevated highway through industrial district

events.description: passing under overhead highway gantry with signs

agents.ego_description: driving a gold convertible at high speed on a multi-lane highway, overtaking other vehicles while approaching the city

notable_agents.action: blue van driving parallel in the right lane
white sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: metal overhead sign structure spanning the highway with support pillars
low-rise industrial buildings with corrugated metal facades and smokestacks
raised concrete highway ramp with metal support pillars
tall metal lattice towers with high voltage power lines
tall futuristic glass and steel towers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial highway with the gold convertible driving at high speed. The camera follows from behind as the vehicle passes under overhead gantries, with industrial warehouses on the left and elevated highway structures on the right. The downtown skyline is visible in the distance under clear afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing under series of overpass bridges

events.description: passing under first red overpass bridge, entering more urban built-up area
beginning left curve on highway ramp, steering into the turn

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed while navigating under overpasses and steering through a left curve on the highway ramp

notable_agents.action: black car overtaking on the left side of the highway

entered.detail: large red-painted highway overpass with thick concrete support pillars
tall glass and steel corporate buildings with geometric facades
green metal noise reduction panels lining the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under a series of red overpass bridges, transitioning from the industrial zone to a more urban environment with modern office buildings. The highway curves left, and green sound barriers appear along the right side. The downtown towers grow larger as the car approaches the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway ramp leading into underpass tunnel

events.description: entering dark tunnel with artificial ceiling lighting, sunlight disappears
exiting tunnel back to daylight, emerging into sunken trench

agents.ego_description: navigating a sharp left curve on the ramp and driving through a short underpass tunnel

entered.detail: dark rectangular opening of the underpass tunnel with concrete frame
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling
smooth gray and red concrete walls of the underpass interior

segments.scene_description: The highway curves sharply left with green barriers on both sides, leading into a dark underpass tunnel. Inside the tunnel, artificial linear lights illuminate the concrete walls. The vehicle exits the tunnel after a few seconds, emerging back into daylight within a sunken highway trench.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken highway trench with advertising billboards and steam vents

events.description: exiting tunnel into open trench with high retaining walls and urban buildings
passing large industrial building with illuminated '10' sign and steam vents

agents.ego_description: driving through a sunken highway corridor with high walls, passing digital advertisements and industrial structures

notable_agents.action: city bus driving in the left lane of the trench highway

entered.detail: high concrete retaining walls with green metal barriers on top
tall industrial building with large illuminated number 10 on the facade
industrial pipes releasing white steam into the air
elevated highway bridge crossing over the sunken trench

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the tunnel into a sunken highway trench flanked by high retaining walls. The scene features a prominent building with a large illuminated '10' sign and industrial steam vents on the left. The car passes under overpass bridges while driving alongside other traffic, with the downtown core growing closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban trench with neon advertisements and overhead infrastructure

events.description: entering darker section under multiple overpasses, sunlight mostly blocked
passing neon 'Brain Wash' sign and other illuminated advertisements on left

agents.ego_description: driving through a shadowy trench with neon signs, overhead pipes, and dense urban infrastructure creating a canyon-like effect

entered.detail: illuminated purple and orange neon sign reading 'Brain Wash' on the building wall
large industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling of the trench
vertical metal slats on the right retaining wall allowing airflow
multiple illuminated billboards and digital posters for various products

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a deeper, darker trench section where multiple overpasses block the sunlight. Neon signs including a prominent 'Brain Wash' advertisement illuminate the left wall, while large industrial pipes run overhead. The metal grate walls and dense infrastructure create an enclosed, urban canyon atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching city center with massive corporate buildings and digital displays

events.description: emerging from dark trench into open area with Orbital Air building and massive billboards
passing large digital billboards displaying anime-style characters and advertisements

agents.ego_description: approaching the city center core with towering skyscrapers and massive digital displays visible ahead

notable_agents.action: lead vehicle entering the downtown city center area

entered.detail: tall corporate skyscraper with 'Orbital Air' signage near the top
giant digital screen displaying anime-style character advertisements
cable-stayed bridge structure with white support cables visible on the right
open plaza area with modern architecture and multiple digital signage structures

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the dark trench into a more open area approaching the city center. The Orbital Air skyscraper dominates the center view, while massive digital billboards with anime characters cover the left buildings. A suspension bridge is visible on the right as the highway leads into the dense downtown core with its towering corporate architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a gold convertible speeds from an open industrial highway into the enclosed depths of a sunken urban trench. It begins by trailing the vehicle past overhead gantries and warehouses, with the distant downtown skyline framing the horizon under clear afternoon skies. As the car passes under a series of red overpass bridges, the industrial landscape shifts into a more urban environment characterized by modern office buildings and green sound barriers. The highway then curves sharply left, pulling the camera away from the daylight and into a dark underpass tunnel illuminated by artificial linear lights. Finally, the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, transitioning back into the sun as it enters a sunken highway trench surrounded by concrete walls.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle travels from a sunken industrial highway into the towering, neon-lit heart of the downtown core. It begins by exiting a tunnel into a highway trench flanked by high retaining walls, passing an illuminated sign and steam vents while moving under a series of overpass bridges. As the road dips further, the scene shifts into a darker, enclosed urban canyon where sunlight is blocked by overhead pipes and the walls are lit by neon advertisements, including a prominent Brain Wash sign. The environment then opens up as the vehicle emerges from the shadows, revealing a vast cityscape dominated by the Orbital Air skyscraper and massive digital billboards featuring anime characters. The camera finally glides toward the dense corporate architecture of the city center, passing a suspension bridge as the horizon fills with skyscrapers.
